arts.ttl: Leeds United make “audacious bid” to sign Premier League midfielder with 61 goals & 37 assists
arts.sum: Leeds United are reportedly eyeing Manchester City midfielder James McAtee, with an ambitious plan to bring the highly-rated 22-year-old to Elland Road during the January transfer window. Renowned for his exceptional technical skills and creative flair, McAtee has caught the attention of multiple clubs. arts.ttl: Leeds team news: Farke “concerned” with Wöber
arts.sum: Leeds United centre-back Max Wöber has missed a large portion of the season so far with knee issues, but returned to action with Austria in this month’s international break. Swansea City await for Leeds this Sunday in the Championship, and the extended period between the international break and a return to league action is a relief for Daniel Farke.

arts.ttl: Preview: Swansea City vs. Leeds United - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Sunday's Championship clash between Swansea City and Leeds United, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.

arts.ttl: Sky Sports pundit says Leeds United have just made a bid to sign PL star in January
arts.sum: Leeds United are sure to be on the hunt for a new attacking midfielder during the January window, and their attention might return to Manchester City’s James McAtee after failing in the summer. Having failed to land that elusive attacking midfielder, the 49ers will no doubt be formulating plans and potential approaches ahead of the new year and January window.
